prompts: YOU'VE BEEN ARRESTED FOR DIGGING A TUNNEL FROM YOUR HOUSE TO THE CENTRAL BANK. YOU ONLY GET ONE PHONE CALL. WHO DO YOU CALL? FROM <green>LEAST LOGICAL</green> TO <red>MOST LOGICAL</red>.
SAY "BOO!" TO SOMEONE OF YOUR CHOICE. FROM <green>SUPER ADORABLE</green> TO <red>SUPER TERRIFYING</red>.
YOU CAN LIVE THE LIFE OF A CHARACTER FROM A TV SHOW. WHICH ONE WOULD IT BE? FROM YOUR <green>WORST NIGHTMARE</green> TO YOUR <red>IDEAL LIFE</red>.
YOU'RE SITTING ON A PLANE ABOUT TO TAKE OFF. "HELLO, MY NAME IS VICTOR AND I'LL BE YOUR PILOT...". COMPLETE THE SENTENCE: FROM <green>LEAST REASSURING</green> TO <red>MOST REASSURING</red>.
WHERE WOULD YOU HIDE DURING A ZOMBIE INVASION? FROM <green>SURVIVAL GUARANTEED</green> TO <red>CERTAIN DEATH</red>.

<u>CAPITEN</u> IS LOST IN THE MIDDLE OF THE JUNGLE, FAR FROM ANY CIVILIZATION. IT'S CLEAR HE'LL HAVE TO LIVE THE REST OF HIS LIFE LIKE TARZAN. WHAT WILL HE MISS THE MOST? FROM <green>A LITTLE</green> TO <red>A LOT</red>.

YOU ORDERED SOMETHING ONLINE, BUT THE DELIVERY DRIVER SAYS THERE WAS A MISTAKE AND THEY BROUGHT YOU A THOUSAND OF THEM. WHAT DID YOU ORDER? FROM "I CAN USE THESE" TO "WHAT AM I SUPPOSED TO DO WITH ALL THIS?"
MIME: TASTE A DISH OF SPICY FOOD, FROM <green>NOT VERY SPICY</green> TO <red>EXTREMELY SPICY</red>.
YOU ENTER A HAUNTED HOUSE. MAKE THE SOUND YOU HEAR, FROM <green>NOT VERY SCARY</green> TO <red>TERRIFYING</red>.
YOU ARE THE SUPERVILLAIN IN THE NEW SUPERHERO MOVIE EVERYONE IS TALKING ABOUT. WHAT WOULD YOUR NAME AND POWER BE? FROM <green>NOT VERY DANGEROUS</green> TO <red>SUPER EVIL AND DANGEROUS</red>.
IN A TABLOID MAGAZINE: "YOU WON'T BELIEVE WHO WAS FOUND TOTALLY WASTED IN A SEWER! SEE PAGE 12." WHO ARE YOU GOING TO FIND ON PAGE 12? FROM <green>LEAST LIKELY</green> TO <red>MOST LIKELY</red>.
YOU ARE AT A SPEED DATING EVENT: SAY A LINE THAT MAKES YOU LOOK GOOD, FROM <green>THE WORST</green> TO <red>THE BEST</red>.
ALLERGY SEASON IS HERE: SNEEZE, FROM THE <green>MOST DISCREET</green> TO THE <red>MOST EXPLOSIVE</red>.
YOU'VE BEEN INVITED TO DINNER AT THE TEMPLE OF DOOM, DEEP IN THE JUNGLE. THE OTHER GUESTS HAVE ORDERED MONKEY BRAIN SORBET. WHAT DO YOU CHOOSE? FROM <green>YUCK!</green> TO <red>YUM!</red>.
"OOPS! I ACCIDENTALLY PUSHED MY MOTHER-IN-LAW AND SHE FELL ONTO...". COMPLETE THE SENTENCE: FROM <green>MOST HARMLESS</green> TO <red>MOST DANGEROUS</red>.
"MR. BOND, IF YOU DON'T REVEAL THE SECRET CODE, I AM GOING TO...". COMPLETE THE SENTENCE: FROM <green>THE MILDEST THREAT</green> TO <red>THE MOST SERIOUS THREAT</red>.
WHAT YOU LIKE MOST ABOUT DANIELA'S HOUSE IS... COMPLETE: FROM <green>NOT VERY ATTRACTIVE</green> TO <red>VERY ATTRACTIVE</red>.
SURPRISE! <u>CAPITEN</u>'S DAD HAS CHANGED THE WALLPAPER, CURTAINS, AND BEDDING IN HIS ROOM SO EVERYTHING HAS THE SAME PATTERN. WHAT IS IT? FROM <green>THE WORST</green> TO <red>THE BEST IDEA</red>.
A TRUCK CUTS YOU OFF ON THE HIGHWAY. INSULT THEM, FROM <green>LEAST AGGRESSIVE</green> TO <red>MOST AGGRESSIVE</red>.
YOU ARE IN A DESERT AND HAVE NO WATER LEFT, BUT SUDDENLY, YOU FIND AN OASIS! ACT OUT HOW YOU WOULD DRINK WATER, FROM "THIRSTY" TO "I HAVEN'T DRUNK ANYTHING IN THREE DAYS".
THE PLAYER TO YOUR RIGHT PRETENDS TO TAKE A PHOTO OF YOU AND COUNTS: "ONE, TWO, THREE. CHEESE!": POSE FOR THE PHOTO! FROM <green>THE WORST</green> TO <red>THE BEST POSE</red>.
WHICH DESTINATION WOULD YOU CHOOSE FOR A VACATION? FROM <green>ONE YOU HAVE NEVER WANTED TO VISIT</green> TO <red>ONE YOU HAVE ALWAYS WANTED TO TRAVEL TO</red>.
YOU ARE OUT TO DINNER. WHAT DESSERTS ARE ON THE MENU? FROM <green>THE MOST TYPICAL</green> TO <red>THE MOST ORIGINAL</red>.
SOMEONE INVITED <u>CAPITEN</u> OUT ON TINDER. AFTER DINNER, THEY HEAD TO THEIR DATE'S APARTMENT. WHAT DOES THE POSTER ABOVE THE BED SAY? FROM "I'M GETTING OUT OF HERE" TO "IT'S MY SOULMATE".
<u>CAPITEN</u> TOOK A DNA TEST AND FOUND OUT HE IS RELATED TO... COMPLETE: FROM <green>THE WORST</green> TO <red>THE BEST NEWS</red>.
YOU ARE SANTA'S ELVES AND THIS YEAR YOU'VE DECIDED TO GIVE THE SAME GIFT TO ALL OF HUMANITY. PROPOSE AN IDEA TO SANTA, FROM <green>THE WORST GIFT</green> TO <red>THE BEST GIFT</red>.
YOU'VE BOOKED AN AIRBNB AND JUST ARRIVED. DESCRIBE THE ROOM YOU HAVE TO SLEEP IN, FROM <green>LOOKING SKETCHY</green> TO <red>LOOKING AMAZING</red>.
USE GESTURES: "I CAUGHT A FISH THIS BIG." FROM <green>THE SMALLEST FISH</green> TO <red>THE BIGGEST</red>.
MIME: YOU ARE WATCHING A TENNIS MATCH AT ROLAND GARROS. FROM <green>A VERY SLOW GAME</green> TO <red>A VERY FAST ONE</red>.

YOU ARE COMING HOME AFTER A PARTY WHERE YOU DRANK TOO MUCH. YOU ARE TRYING NOT TO MAKE A SCENE, BUT YOU ARE CARRYING SOMETHING THAT MAKES A LOT OF NOISE... WHAT IS IT? FROM <green>"IT'S OKAY, THE SOUND IS QUITE DISCREET"</green> TO <red>"SO LOUD! YOU'RE GOING TO GET KILLED"</red>.
"MOM, MEET CRIS, THEY WORK AS A...". COMPLETE, FROM <green>THE WORST PROFESSION</green> TO <red>THE BEST PROFESSION</red> TO TELL YOUR IN-LAWS.
YOU HAD TO WAIT SO LONG AT THE POST OFFICE THAT YOU HAD TIME TO... COMPLETE, FROM <green>THE SHORTEST ACTIVITY</green> TO <red>THE LONGEST</red>.
